name: InputPollOption
description: This object contains information about one answer option in a poll to be sent.

fields.name: text_parse_mode
fields.description: Mode for parsing entities in the text. See formatting options for more details. Currently, only custom emoji entities are allowed.

fields.name: text_entities
fields.description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in the poll option text. It can be specified instead of text_parse_mode.

fields.name: media
fields.description: Media added to the poll option
